claims.text: You have 60 days from the statement date on which the charge first appeared to dispute an unauthorized or billing-error charge
There is no fee to file a dispute.
the online dispute portal is operating normally

answer_text: You have 60 days from the statement date on which the charge first appeared to dispute an unauthorized or billing-error charge on a standard US checking account. There is no fee to file a dispute. As of 2026-07-17, the online dispute portal is operating normally, so the customer can submit the dispute through the portal or with an agent. Informational answer composed from approved sources as of 2026-07-17; not advice and not a coverage, eligibility, or account determination. Verify against the system of record before relying on it.
uncertainty: Reflects standard US checking terms; for commercial or non-US accounts, confirm the applicable product terms before relying on this. The archived 30-day figure is expired and was not used.
disclaimer: Informational answer composed from approved sources as of 2026-07-17; not advice and not a coverage, eligibility, or account determination. Verify against the system of record before relying on it.
